title: Mycosia flower
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Mycosia flower''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of flower that was characterized by its pink petals and white beaded pistils. [[Evir Derricote]] grew them.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
